text: ‘Disappointment gives and gets’; according to the Hebrew text, ‘behaves vilely and shamefully’.
The second half of this verse is difficult, and perhaps corrupt.
‘Neglect the command’ acording to the Hebrew text; it omits the second half of the verse.
The Latin appears to connect this verse with the preceding one; the Hebrew text has ‘There is much food in the fallow-lands of the poor, but there are some who are swept away, not by just judgment’.
